goal: List the contents of the schema directory in the super intelligence app codebase and review the core files for inefficiencies or gaps.

spoken_summary: I found the schema directory, but it looks like the listing didn't complete — I'm not seeing the file contents or any analysis of the core files. Want me to try again and actually pull up what's in there so I can review it for inefficiencies?
